ideal_candidate.content: A highly ambitious fresher who has built real products, participated in hackathons, experimented with AI tools, and demonstrates strong learning velocity. They may not know everything but consistently figure things out and ship.

location_comp.content: Bangalore preferred. Suitable for final-year students, recent graduates, or candidates with less than 2 years of experience. Compensation should balance learning opportunity, ownership, and startup upside.

teachable_vs_innate.provenance: Focus on aptitude over existing technical depth.

must_haves: Built at least one end-to-end project
red_flags: No evidence of building outside coursework
Uses AI but cannot explain generated code
Waiting for detailed instructions before taking action
No curiosity about users or products
must_haves_red_flags.provenance: Freshers evaluated on potential and initiative.

search_playbook.content: Source from hackathons, engineering colleges, open-source communities, startup clubs, AI builder communities, and student founders. Prioritize builders over academic achievers.

tension_cards.title: Potential vs Experience
tension_cards.body: We're betting on learning velocity and ambition rather than years of industry experience.

tension_cards.title: Shipping vs Perfection
tension_cards.body: We prefer candidates who build and learn from real users instead of endlessly polishing projects.

tension_cards.title: AI Usage vs Understanding
tension_cards.body: AI should accelerate your work, not replace your thinking.
